title: Rail Vikas Nigam is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Rail Vikas Nigam is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Rail Vikas Nigam family as a Warehouse Manager in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Rail Vikas Nigam:
Rail Vikas Nigam is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rail Vikas Nigam!
